title: On-Foot Deaths
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS deaths FROM Died WHERE KillerName IS NOT NULL AND KillerShip IS NULL AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {deaths} on-foot death(s) recorded during the report period. Unlike ship loss, there is no rebuy screen — just a respawn point and the quiet indignity of having been outshot by a security guard.
details.help: Died events where KillerShip IS NULL indicate on-foot deaths. KillerName identifies the attacker.

tagLines: Pilot fatality incidents logged. Medical bay usage noted. The Pilots Federation advises a review of tactical approach.
You died on your feet. That's almost poetic. Almost.
The body bag count is a honest ledger of every plan that didn't survive contact with the enemy.
